mechanics.excerpt: Elementals who wash out of training most often end up in the laborer caste where their strength and endurance make them excellent workers_ The primary advantages Elementals receive are modified Attribute thresholds in the Life Path (STR +2 BOD +1 DEX -1) and modified Attribute maximums as noted the Attribute Maximums Table 56).
